title: goodenia splendida
intro: Goodenia splendida, also known as the blue Goodenia, is a small, perennial herb native to the eastern coast of Australia, belonging to the family Goodeniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Goodenia splendida include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of certain infections. In herbal preparations, Goodenia splendida is often made into a tea or infused in oil, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
